name: Time Door API
description: A scalable, resilient, and fully documented API for integrated time series analysis. Provides anomaly detection (point and collective), matrix profile computation, missing value imputation, data transformations, forecasting, changepoint detection, motif discovery, pattern chain analysis, serial dependency analysis, spectral analysis, and causal relation inference.
